channel.title: HFaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from HFaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘AI genuinely freaks me out’: Do I leave my cushy $150,000 nonprofit job for a $215,000 position in data analytics?
item.description: “There’s basically no upward mobility unless someone above me leaves.”

item.title: AMD’s stock is red hot and on track to hit a major milestone
item.description: The chip maker will likely benefit from server CPU demand more than Intel, Morgan Stanley says

item.title: ‘My child will need lifelong support’: I’m in my 40s with $330,000. How can I make this last both our lifetimes?
item.description: “The portfolio has grown, but I can’t help feeling that it hasn’t grown as much as it could have.”

item.title: Pirro drops probe into Fed’s Powell, paving way for Warsh confirmation
item.description: President Donald Trump’s Department of Justice on Friday said that it’s backing down in a standoff over the leadership of the Federal Reserve, and tha...

item.title: Private funds with high fees are coming for your 401(k) — and Trump’s acting labor secretary is cheering them on
item.description: Donald Trump’s new retirement plan overseer is eager to open up Americans’ retirement accounts to exotic investments

item.title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: Apple, AMD, Intel, Oracle, Caterpillar, Shake Shack & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Friday.

item.title: Michael Burry adds a new Microsoft bet, doubles down on software
item.description: Burry is leaning into what he sees as opportunities in oversold software and fintech payments stocks.

item.title: Intel is soaring after an earnings beat. These two Wall Street firms call the stock a buy
item.description: Intel's strong first-quarter financial results show the semiconductor maker can capitalize on a boom in chipmaking and AI, per two Wall Street shops.

item.title: Oracle is down big in 2026. Dan Ives says buy the dip
item.description: The Wedbush analyst initiated the software giant with an outperform rating.

item.title: These stocks reporting next week can beat expectations and rally, Bespoke says
item.description: CNBC Pro screened for stocks releasing quarterly financials next week that beat expectations for earnings per share at least 75% of the time.

item.title: Trump’s Psychedelic Executive Order and CMPS Stock: Upward Pressure or Short-Lived Pop?
item.description: Compass Pathways (CMPS) shares jumped sharply on Monday, April 20, 2026, rising roughly 47 percent intraday and trading near $9.80. The catalyst was c...

item.title: Target Hospitality (TH) Explodes on $550M Data Center Mega-Deal
item.description: Folks, if you’re scanning the market today and wondering why one name is lighting up the screens like a fireworks show, look no further than Target Ho...

item.title: Tilly’s Stock Pops After Q4 Earnings Surprise
item.description: Hey folks, let’s talk about Tilly’s – that’s the retailer slinging cool clothes and gear for the young crowd. Their stock, ticker TLYS, is making wave...

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...
